name: Iter17 — Save Comparison redirects to /comparisons and shows new row
description: After comparing two PRs on /compare and clicking Save Comparison, the app redirects to /comparisons and the newly saved comparison appears as a row in the table.

planSteps.description: Verify the Old PR and New PR input fields are visible
Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1 into the Old PR input field
Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/2 into the New PR input field
Verify a loading indicator appears while both PRs are being analyzed
Verify the Score Comparison Banner appears showing two scores and a delta arrow after analysis completes
Verify the Save Comparison button is visible below the results
Verify the page redirects to /comparisons and the URL in the browser changes to /comparisons
Verify the /comparisons page shows a table row for the newly saved comparison with the two PR URLs and score delta
